prompts.name: Clean White Studio
prompts.text: Use a clean white studio background with soft even lighting, minimal distractions, and clear subject focus.

prompts.name: Dark Studio
prompts.text: Use a dark studio background with controlled contrast, readable subject lighting, and refined dramatic simplicity.

prompts.name: Soft Gradient
prompts.text: Use a smooth gradient background with gentle color transition and polished visual balance.

prompts.name: Bokeh Lights
prompts.text: Use a softly blurred background with glowing bokeh lights that add depth without distracting from the subject.

prompts.name: City Skyline
prompts.text: Use a city skyline background with atmospheric distance, urban lights, and clear environmental context.

prompts.name: Blurred Forest
prompts.text: Use a softly blurred forest background with natural greenery, depth, and gentle outdoor atmosphere.

prompts.name: Beach Horizon
prompts.text: Use a beach horizon background with open sky, water, sand, and a relaxed coastal feeling.

prompts.name: Minimal Room
prompts.text: Use a minimal interior background with clean shapes, soft light, and uncluttered visual structure.

prompts.name: Abstract Shapes
prompts.text: Use tasteful abstract background shapes that support the composition without overwhelming the subject.

prompts.name: Paper Texture
prompts.text: Use a subtle paper-texture background with soft grain, natural warmth, and gentle artistic character.

prompts.name: Flower Wall
prompts.text: Use a decorative flower wall background with layered blossoms, soft color, and romantic charm.

prompts.name: Neon Blur
prompts.text: Use a blurred neon background with colorful light spill, reflective mood, and stylish city-night energy.

prompts.name: Cloudscape
prompts.text: Use a cloud-filled background with soft light, open space, and peaceful airy atmosphere.

prompts.name: Window View
prompts.text: Use a window-view background with soft exterior detail, natural light, and believable indoor depth.

prompts.name: Ornate Pattern
prompts.text: Use an ornate patterned background with decorative detail, refined symmetry, and elegant visual rhythm.
